summary: Added Anthropic competitive positioning to home page market landscape section

details.change: Added 'And it's not just startups' bridge paragraph linking Anthropic's 3-feature cloud push (Dynamic Workflows, Routines, Auto Mode) to the existing YC P26 anti-cloud narrative. Links to the ralph-workflow-vs-anthropic-dynamic-workflows comparison blog post deployed earlier today.

rationale: All 7 external distribution lanes remain fully blocked. The home page is the site's highest-traffic conversion surface. Anthropic's 3 cloud-only features in 6 weeks is the most significant competitive entry since YC P26, and the landing page had no mention of it. Adding it strengthens the anti-cloud positioning that is Ralph's core differentiator.

verification.content_live: confirmed 'And it's not just startups' and link href present on ralphworkflow.com

blocked_lanes_checked: Stoneforge listing (no GitHub auth for issues, no Discord)
